lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Hi, Rookie. You’re late.

lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: Oh no. She noticed. Do I tell her about the guard? Or do I just apologize?

lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: The guard wouldn't let me in, Ma'am.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: The guard? Good. That means he's doing his job.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: We have standards here at The Paragon.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: If you can't present a proper ID, you can't be trusted with a headline.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Since you're the new encoder, let's see if you can follow simple instructions.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: I need your staff profile for the digital database.

lines.speaker: Kiko
lines.text: Just... type my name and bio?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Not just 'type,' Rookie. Format.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: I want your Name in a professional standard.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: I want your Bio in Times New Roman.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: And for goodness sake, use proper sizing.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: That's your station. Don't make me use the red pen on your first attempt. Go.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Hmmmm… I gotta say, not bad for a Rookie.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Well done. Let's see how you did.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: [FEEDBACK]

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Well, that should be it.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Dismissed.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Santos
lines.text: Did the guard see you? You should really get yourself an Application Form first.
